title: Extend project automation to allow other conditions
excerpt:

posts.author: swduncan801 (Shannon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, the automation that allows you to automatically create and like a project to a portfolio when an item is created only allows for one project template type to be selected.

When an item is created and only if *column is * empty create a *project* from template.

I’d like to see a change where we can create condition that allows us to select other options (much like how its set up with boards)

When an item is created and [enter ability to add condition, ie "if *status* is *[defined]* only if *column is * empty create a *project* from template.
